👫

Hey! We're moving to Europe 🇪🇺

After years of dreaming about it, we finally decided to take the leap. We're documenting everything – the good, the bad, the bureaucracy, and all the research we're doing along the way.

🌍
✈️
🏰
--- # _includes/components/hero.njk ---
👫

Hey! We're moving to Europe 🇪🇺

After years of dreaming about it, we finally decided to take the leap. We're documenting everything – the good, the bad, the bureaucracy, and all the research we're doing along the way.

🌍
✈️
🏰

Why we're doing this

💭

The Realization

"We kept saying 'someday we'll move to Europe' and then realized we'd been saying it for like 5 years. So here we are, actually trying to figure out how to make it happen!"

🌍 The Dream

⚖️Better work-life balance

🏥Universal healthcare

🚶Walkable cities

🏛️Rich history and culture

✈️Easy European travel

😅 The Reality Check

📋Overwhelming visa paperwork

🗣️Language barriers

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦Leaving family behind

💼Career transitions

🏢SO. MUCH. BUREAUCRACY.

--- # _includes/components/timeline.njk ---

Recent updates from our journey

We picked our top 3 countries! 🎉

March 15

After months of research, we've narrowed it down to Netherlands, Portugal, and Germany. Each has different pros/cons and visa paths.

First language lessons started 📚

March 8

Started Dutch and Portuguese lessons on Duolingo. Mike is way better at Dutch, I'm picking up Portuguese faster.

Had our first "oh crap" moment 😅

Feb 28

Realized we need to think about taxes way earlier than we thought. US citizens still file US taxes living abroad!

--- # _includes/theme-switcher.njk ---
🎨
